productDisplayName: W Women Printed Multi Coloured Kurta
description: CompositionPrinted multicoloured kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, has short sleeves with a buttonable tab at the cuffs, flaring pin-tucks at the chest, half buttoned placket and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironEvery woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with w's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Model statisticsThe product is a size 8 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
